topic: Should college students be allowed to use AI tools for assignments?

turns.speaker: Anu
turns.text: AI tools can help students understand topics faster and improve productivity.

turns.speaker: Ravi
turns.text: But students may depend too much on AI and stop thinking on their own.

turns.speaker: Priya
turns.text: I think AI should be allowed only as a support tool, not as a full replacement for effort.

turns.speaker: Anu
turns.text: Yes, proper guidelines are important so that AI is used ethically.
